title: Duzzit Quick Cleaning Floor Wipes 24Pk, Resealable
features: DUZZIT FLOOR WIPES: Keep your floors sparkling clean with these lemon fresh wipes. They collect dirt and grime in a single wipe, ideal for linoleum, ceramic, tiled and sealed wood floors
EXTRA TOUGH: A single wipe will quickly tackle dirt, spills and household floor stains, leaving a sparkling clean surface
MULTI-FIT: Duzzit Floor Wipes are designed to fit most floor mops. Attach to a flat floor mop for quick and easy cleaning, afterwards simply remove wipe and dispose in a household bin
FRESH LEMON SCENT: Each wipe is lightly scented with a fresh, citrus fragrance, leaving a lovely long lasting fresh lemon scent in the room
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, Each resealable pack contains 24 wipes for hygienic floor cleaning
description: Product Description Duzzit Floor Wipes keep your household floors sparkling clean with these tough, extra-large wipes. The multi-fit Duzzit Floor Wipes are designed to fit most floor mops. Attach to a flat floor mop for quick and easy cleaning. Suitable for linoleum, ceramic tiled and sealed wood floors. Securely re-seal pack between uses to prevent the wipes drying out. After use dispose of the wipe in household bin. Pack size 24 Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene, Citral, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone Manufacturer Contact Information Duzzit Floor Wipes (33% Extra Free) 24 pack See more
